text: Hello. What can I do for you? Hey, glad to hear you. I'm James from Nova Healthcare, Virginia. I'm calling to let you know about a cash-back benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? I'm 69 years old. Perfect. You are qualified for the plans. Just hold on for a second, please. Here we go.
